overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing the character Geralt exploring a sunlit Mediterranean-style palace villa with stone architecture, lush gardens, and panoramic views of a lake and mountains. The character moves through covered colonnades, garden terraces, narrow alleyways, and courtyards with fountains.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered colonnade transitioning to open terrace

events.description: exits covered colonnade into open sunlit terrace with lake view

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through stone colonnade toward open terrace

entered.detail: ornate carved stone pillars supporting the covered walkway
large tree with bright red blossoms in circular planter
stone ceiling of the covered arcade
arched opening leading to exterior terrace
distant panoramic view of blue lake and mountain range

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a shaded stone colonnade with ornate columns and a red flowering tree. As the character moves forward, the space opens through an archway onto a sunlit terrace revealing a distant mountain and lake vista.

events.description: reaches top of stairs entering formal garden terrace

agents.ego_description: Geralt climbing stone stairs along the villa exterior

entered.detail: wide stone steps with carved balustrades
manicured green shrubbery lining the path
stone seating along the garden path
terracotta roof tiles of distant buildings

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a grand stone staircase flanked by balustrades, transitioning from the terrace into a formal garden area with trimmed hedges and stone benches, while the panoramic lake view remains visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated garden terrace with scenic overlook

events.description: character stops briefly at overlook to view coastal town below

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking along garden path observing the scenic vista

notable_agents.action: child in red clothing walking along the path
guard standing watch near the terrace edge

entered.detail: low stone wall marking the terrace edge
view of village with orange roofs along the lakeshore
decorative trees with pink and red blossoms

segments.scene_description: Walking along an elevated garden terrace with manicured hedges and flowering trees, the character passes a child and a guard while approaching a stone railing that offers a panoramic view of a coastal town and distant mountains.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service alley between stone buildings

events.description: enters shaded narrow alleyway between high stone walls
passing through darker section of alley with hanging plants

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through narrow passage between buildings

vibrant red plastered building facade
potted greenery suspended from above
ornate carved wooden doorway with metal studs

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow, shaded alleyway with high stone walls, passing a vibrant red building facade with hanging plants and ornate wooden doors, transitioning from the open terrace to an enclosed passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: courtyard with central fountain and historic buildings

events.description: exits narrow alley into sunlit courtyard with fountain
circles around central fountain with lily pond

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through courtyard, passing by the central fountain and continuing toward an arched passageway

notable_agents.action: civilian sitting on bench near the fountain

entered.detail: octagonal stone fountain with water lilies
shallow pool with green lily pads
multi-story stone buildings with arched windows
large arched passage leading to upper levels

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the alley into a bright courtyard, the character circles a central stone fountain surrounded by lily ponds, passing seated civilians and historic buildings before approaching a grand stone archway leading further into the villa complex.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit palace villa, transitioning from shaded colonnades and open garden terraces into narrow alleyways and a bright central courtyard. It begins within a shaded stone colonnade beside a red flowering tree, moving through an archway that opens onto a sunlit terrace with a distant mountain and lake vista. As the character ascends a grand stone staircase, the scene shifts into a formal garden of trimmed hedges and stone benches before gliding along an elevated terrace past a child and a guard toward a panoramic view of a coastal town. The perspective then narrows as the camera enters a shaded alleyway with high stone walls and a vibrant red building facade, transitioning from the open air into an enclosed passage. Finally, the shot emerges into a bright courtyard to circle a central stone fountain and lily ponds before approaching a grand stone archway leading deeper into the villa complex.
